example_descriptor_t(3) Library Functions Manual example_descriptor_t(3)

NAME

example_descriptor_t - Example descriptor for programmatic EXAMPLES generation.

SYNOPSIS

#include <include/ascii-chat/options/builder.h>

Data Fields


uint32_t mode_bitmask
Bitmask of modes (OPTION_MODE_SERVER, OPTION_MODE_CLIENT, etc.). const char * args
Command-line arguments part of the example. const char * description
bool owns_args_memory
True if args memory should be freed by options_config_destroy. bool is_utility_command
True if this is a utility command (don't prepend program name).

Detailed Description

Example descriptor for programmatic EXAMPLES generation.

Stores command components separately for semantic coloring:

  • mode_bitmask: which modes this example applies to
  • args: green

Definition at line 310 of file builder.h.
